doc_title: Unauthorized Practice of Law — ABA Model Rule 5.5
label: fabricated
reason: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers with subsections (a) through (d), whereas this document invents subsections about paralegal supervision, a nonexistent "no emergency exception," and a fabricate
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 focuses on multijurisdictional practice by lawyers and contains subsections (a) through (d) addressing temporary and permanent practice by out-of-state lawyers; this document fabricates subsections (b) and (c) about paralegal activities and "no emergency exception" language that do not appear in the real rule, and the definition of "practice of law" in subsection (a) is invented rather than reflecting the actual text.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The actual ABA Model Rule 5.5 addresses multijurisdictional practice by lawyers with subsections (a) through (d), whereas this document invents subsections about paralegal supervision, a nonexistent "no emergency exception," and a fabricated definition of "practice of law" not found in the real rule.
